title: justicia leucoesthes
intro: Justicia leucoesthes, also known as 'White-flowered Justicia', is a perennial herb belonging to the Acanthaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Justicia leucoesthes include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and providing relief from skin irritations and wounds. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas, infusions, or decoctions from its leaves, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to reap its benefits.
